response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of solid full-stack engineering experience across diverse languages (TypeScript, DLang, C/C++, Java) and some exposure to high-throughput systems at Sociomantic. However, the resume shows no direct experience with experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, feature flagging systems, or telemetry/metrics infrastructure that are central to this Principal/IC6 growth engineering role. Career trajectory reflects senior IC work but lacks the multi-team platform leadership and growth/measurement systems focus expected at IC6.
strengths: 13+ years of polyglot engineering experience across web, mobile, and embedded systems
High-throughput backend experience at Sociomantic handling millions of HTTP requests/second
Strong software craftsmanship discipline (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, teaching/workshops)
concerns: No demonstrated experience with experimentation platforms, A/B testing, or feature flagging systems
Lacks evidence of telemetry/metrics infrastructure or statistical analysis work
Missing Principal-level scope: no clear multi-team platform leadership or cross-org influence shown

key_factors.factor: Strong polyglot engineering breadth and longevity
Insufficient evidence of IC6-level cross-team platform leadership
